personalInfo.name: Ethan Gordon
personalInfo.title: Systems Integrator | Embedded/Robotics | Net/DevOps | U.S. Navy Vet (Secret-eligible)

summary.text: I bridge hardware, autonomy software, and networking. From ROS2 stacks on a Steam Deck to GPU ML in LXC and RF mesh tinkering with RTL-SDR, I ship field-ready systems, then break and harden them in the wild. Mission-first, clearance-ready, ramping in days—not months.
highlights: U.S. Navy Nuclear Field veteran with Secret clearance eligibility
Expertise in ROS2, embedded systems, and RF analysis

currentFocus.text: Building field-ready autonomous systems and robust network infrastructure. Specializing in the integration of robotics control stacks, GPU-accelerated ML, and secure communication protocols for mission-critical applications.

experience.title: Independent Engineer / Founder
achievements: Built ROS2↔WebSocket bridge with React UI reducing operator setup from hours to minutes
Fixed Genesis AI Sim AVX crashes in LXC/Docker environments, restoring RL simulation functionality
Implemented NGINX TLS Proxy with self-signed PKI securing Portainer/OpenWebUI/Netdata
Developed RF/Mesh analysis tools using RTL-SDR and explored phased-array reuse for P2P links
Created embedded diagnostics systems including MCU coil tester and TBI injector current-limit solutions

experience.title: Nuclear Field Power School Graduate
achievements: Graduated rigorous Nuclear Field Power School program
Operated complex nuclear systems under strict safety and security protocols
Maintained DoD Secret clearance with excellent security record
Developed expertise in high-reliability systems and mission-critical operations
Gained experience in high-stress, regulated technical environments

projects.name: SDR_OS Steam-Deck ROS2 Control Stack
projects.description: ROS2↔WebSocket bridge with React UI, CUDA/Ollama containers for rapid operator deployment on Steam Deck hardware.

projects.name: Genesis AI Sim AVX Fix
projects.description: CPU-flag gating & legacy binaries solution; resolved AVX2 crashes in LXC/Docker environments to restore RL simulations.

projects.name: NGINX TLS Proxy
projects.description: Self-signed PKI + SNI securing Portainer/OpenWebUI/Netdata with unified HTTPS entry point.

projects.name: RF/Mesh Network Analysis
projects.description: IQ capture/FFT carrier & SNR analysis; explored phased-array reuse for P2P links using RTL-SDR and Starlink integration.

projects.name: Embedded Diagnostics Suite
projects.description: MCU coil tester for Skidoo; 1 Ω TBI injector current-limit solution with series R/PWM control.

projects.name: GPU Passthrough → LXC
projects.description: NVIDIA device passthrough to LXC containers; Docker ML stack with Netdata & Portainer management.

projects.name: Gimbal PID + Computer Vision
projects.description: PID control system in C++ with OpenCV target tracking; XR/VR operator UX concept implementation.

projects.name: Legal Evidence Vector Database
projects.description: SentenceTransformer + FAISS over recfile/org-roam logs; automated court packet generation reducing preparation time significantly.

education.details: Graduated rigorous nuclear engineering program. Operated in high-stress, regulated technical environments. Held DoD Secret clearance (lapsed) with strong classified-handling discipline.
Extensive independent learning in systems integration, robotics, and embedded development. College sophomore level in Secondary Education (Mathematics).
